channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Spain wins World Cup as Sarasota fans celebrate at downtown watch party
item.description: The roar that erupted from Bay Park in downtown Sarasota on Sunday night could have been heard from MetLife Stadium itself.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] US launches more airstrikes against Iran after announcing another death of a service member
item.description: The United States began a new round of airstrikes early Monday targeting Iran after announcing the death of another American service member.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida Lottery Fantasy 5, Cash Pop results for July 19, 2026
